record_types.name: gsl_interp
gsl_interp_accel
gsl_interp_type

variables.name: gsl_interp_akima
variables.code:
gsl_interp_akima : access constant gsl_interp_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_interp_akima";

variables.name: gsl_interp_akima_periodic
variables.code:
gsl_interp_akima_periodic : access constant gsl_interp_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_interp_akima_periodic";

subprograms.name: accel_find
subprograms.code:
function accel_find
  (a : access gsl_interp_accel; x_array : double_array; size : size_t;
   x : double)
   return size_t

subprograms.name: accel_reset
subprograms.code:
function accel_reset
  (a : access gsl_interp_accel)
   return int

subprograms.name: alloc
subprograms.code:
function alloc
  (T : access constant gsl_interp_type; n : size_t)
   return access gsl_interp

subprograms.name: bsearch
subprograms.code:
function bsearch
  (x_array : double_array; x : double; index_lo : size_t; index_hi : size_t)
   return size_t

eval_deriv
eval_deriv2
eval_deriv2_e
subprograms.code:
function eval_deriv2_e
  (obj : access constant gsl_interp; xa : double_array; ya : double_array;
   x   : double; a : access gsl_interp_accel; d2 : double_array)
   return int

subprograms.code:

  (obj : access constant gsl_interp; xa : double_array; ya : double_array;

  (obj : access constant gsl_interp; xa : double_array; ya : double_array;

eval_integ_e
init

subprograms.name: min_size
subprograms.code:
function min_size
  (interp : access constant gsl_interp)
   return unsigned

subprograms.name: name
subprograms.code:
function name
  (interp : access constant gsl_interp)
   return Interfaces.C.Strings
  .chars_ptr

subprograms.code:
function type_min_size
  (T : access constant gsl_interp_type)
   return unsigned
